title: Chinese IME
description: 一個支援拼音/粵語輸入法的 Minecraft 模組，用於輸入中文漢字。
body: Chinese IME 是一個幫助你使用拼音輸入中文的 Minecraft 模組，並同時支援粵拼 (Jyutping) 輸入，適合粵語用家。 它支援簡體及繁體中文。 在Fabric上需安裝 Fabric API，同時可經 Sinytra Connector + Forgified Fabric API 在 Forge 及 NeoForge 上使用。 ## 功能 - 拼音和粵拼支援：輸入 拼音或粵拼，模組會根據你輸入的拼音從而建議相關的中文字。 - 音調支援：拼音/粵拼 後可輸入數字，模組會顯示對應聲調的建議。 - 支護簡體/繁體及粵語模式：可透過聊天介面右上角按鈕，在簡體、繁體及粵語模式間切換。 ## 如何使用 - 在聊天框中開始輸入拼音或粵拼，模組會顯示中文建議。如需選擇聲調，只需在末尾添加音調數字（如輸入 wo3 可獲得“我”）。 - 使用 ↑ / ↓ 鍵，鍵瀏覽字詞建議，按 Enter 選擇有關字詞。 - 同時可使用滑鼠選擇有關字詞。 - 按下聊天介面右上角按鈕則可切換簡體、繁體及粵語模式。 --- **Chinese IME** is a Minecraft mod that helps you input Chinese characters using Pinyin, with additional support for **Jyutping** input for Cantonese speakers. It supports both **Simplified** and **Traditional** Chinese characters. **Requires Fabric API. Also compatible with Forge and NeoForge, using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), requires [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api).** ## Features - **Pinyin and Jyutping Support**: You can type in **Pinyin** or **Jyutping** for Cantonese, and the mod will suggest Chinese characters based on the letters you've entered. - **Tone Support**: You can use tones by typing a digit at the end, and the mod will display tone-specific suggestions. - **Simplified, Traditional, and Cantonese Support**: You can toggle between **Simplified**, **Traditional**, and **Cantonese** modes using a button on the chat screen. ## Usage - Start typing **Pinyin** or **Jyutping** in the chat, and the mod will show you suggestions of Chinese characters. If you want tone-specific results, just add the tone digit at the end (for example, `wo3` for "我"). - Use the **up** and **down** arrow keys to navigate suggestions, and **enter** to select a character. - You can also **scroll** through the list or **click** on the desired character to choose it. - Toggle between Simplified, Traditional, and Cantonese modes using the button on the top-right corner of the chat screen.
